creator: wojciech@sychut.pl
text:
At the bottom of both /security/advisories.html and /security/notices.html pages, there is an information that pages were both "Last modified" on 2013-11-13.
I think that this date should correspond to the date of addition of the newest entry on the list.

Google indexes this date from the bottom of the page, see:  https://www.google.pl/search?q="freebsd+security+advisories"
